---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect detection results, broken API endpoints, or doc errors
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## What's wrong

<!-- A clear description of the bug. If it concerns a specific monitored site,
include the site slug (e.g., `example-relay`). -->

## What you expected

<!-- What the correct result/behavior should be. -->

## Evidence

<!-- For detection accuracy issues: paste the probe log timestamp from the
site's detail page, plus your own evidence (curl output, screenshot, etc.). -->

## Environment (for API/SDK issues only)

- TokenAPI Scan endpoint: <!-- e.g., /api/v1/sites -->
- Client / SDK version: <!-- e.g., tokenscanai-cli 0.1.0, raw curl -->
- Date/time of request (UTC): <!-- helps us correlate to server logs -->
